017package org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
023import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
024
025import java.lang.reflect.*;
026import java.net.*;
027import java.util.*;
028
029import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
035import org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap.*;
036
037/**
038 * Represents a top-level schema object bean in the JSON-Schema core specification.
039 *
040 * <p>
041 * This implementation follows the JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 specification.
042 *
043 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
044 * <p class='bjava'>
045 *    <jc>// Create a simple schema for a person object</jc>
046 *    JsonSchema <jv>schema</jv> = <jk>new</jk> JsonSchema()
047 *       .setIdUri(<js>"https://example.com/person.schema.json"</js>)
048 *       .setSchemaVersionUri(<js>"https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema"</js>)
049 *       .setTitle(<js>"Person"</js>)
050 *       .setDescription(<js>"A person object"</js>)
051 *       .setType(JsonType.<jsf>OBJECT</jsf>)
052 *       .addProperties(
053 *          <jk>new</jk> JsonSchemaProperty(<js>"firstName"</js>, JsonType.<jsf>STRING</jsf>)
054 *             .setMinLength(1)
055 *             .setMaxLength(50),
056 *          <jk>new</jk> JsonSchemaProperty(<js>"lastName"</js>, JsonType.<jsf>STRING</jsf>)
057 *             .setMinLength(1)
058 *             .setMaxLength(50),
059 *          <jk>new</jk> JsonSchemaProperty(<js>"age"</js>, JsonType.<jsf>INTEGER</jsf>)
060 *             .setMinimum(0)
061 *             .setExclusiveMaximum(150)
062 *       )
063 *       .addRequired(<js>"firstName"</js>, <js>"lastName"</js>);
064 *
065 *    <jc>// Serialize to JSON Schema</jc>
066 *    String <jv>json</jv> = JsonSerializer.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.serialize(<jv>schema</jv>);
067 * </p>
068 *
069 * <p>
070 * Output:
071 * <p class='bjson'>
072 *    {
073 *       <js>"$id"</js>: <js>"https://example.com/person.schema.json"</js>,
074 *       <js>"$schema"</js>: <js>"https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema"</js>,
075 *       <js>"title"</js>: <js>"Person"</js>,
076 *       <js>"description"</js>: <js>"A person object"</js>,
077 *       <js>"type"</js>: <js>"object"</js>,
078 *       <js>"properties"</js>: {
079 *          <js>"firstName"</js>: {
080 *             <js>"type"</js>: <js>"string"</js>,
081 *             <js>"minLength"</js>: 1,
082 *             <js>"maxLength"</js>: 50
083 *          },
084 *          <js>"lastName"</js>: {
085 *             <js>"type"</js>: <js>"string"</js>,
086 *             <js>"minLength"</js>: 1,
087 *             <js>"maxLength"</js>: 50
088 *          },
089 *          <js>"age"</js>: {
090 *             <js>"type"</js>: <js>"integer"</js>,
091 *             <js>"minimum"</js>: 0,
092 *             <js>"exclusiveMaximum"</js>: 150
093 *          }
094 *       },
095 *       <js>"required"</js>: [<js>"firstName"</js>, <js>"lastName"</js>]
096 *    }
097 * </p>
098 *
099 * <h5 class='section'>Key Features:</h5>
100 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
101 *    <li><b>Draft 2020-12 Support:</b> Includes all properties from the latest JSON Schema specification
102 *    <li><b>Backward Compatibility:</b> Deprecated Draft 04 properties (like <c>id</c> and <c>definitions</c>) are still supported
103 *    <li><b>Fluent API:</b> All setter methods return <c>this</c> for method chaining
104 *    <li><b>Type Safety:</b> Uses enums and typed collections for validation
105 *    <li><b>Serialization:</b> Can be serialized to any format supported by Juneau (JSON, XML, HTML, etc.)
106 *    <li><b>Auto Generation:</b> Use {@link JsonSchemaBeanGenerator} to generate schemas from Java types
107 * </ul>
108 *
109 * <h5 class='section'>Common Use Cases:</h5>
110 *
111 * <p><b>1. Simple Type Constraints:</b>
112 * <p class='bjava'>
113 *    <jc>// String with length constraints</jc>
114 *    JsonSchema <jv>schema</jv> = <jk>new</jk> JsonSchema()
115 *       .setType(JsonType.<jsf>STRING</jsf>)
116 *       .setMinLength(5)
117 *       .setMaxLength(100)
118 *       .setPattern(<js>"^[A-Za-z]+$"</js>);
119 * </p>
120 *
121 * <p><b>2. Numeric Ranges:</b>
122 * <p class='bjava'>
123 *    <jc>// Number between 0 and 100 (exclusive)</jc>
124 *    JsonSchema <jv>schema</jv> = <jk>new</jk> JsonSchema()
125 *       .setType(JsonType.<jsf>NUMBER</jsf>)
126 *       .setExclusiveMinimum(0)
127 *       .setExclusiveMaximum(100)
128 *       .setMultipleOf(0.5);
129 * </p>
130 *
131 * <p><b>3. Enumerations:</b>
132 * <p class='bjava'>
133 *    <jc>// Status field with allowed values</jc>
134 *    JsonSchema <jv>schema</jv> = <jk>new</jk> JsonSchema()
135 *       .setType(JsonType.<jsf>STRING</jsf>)
136 *       .addEnum(<js>"pending"</js>, <js>"active"</js>, <js>"completed"</js>);
137 * </p>
138 *
139 * <p><b>4. Arrays:</b>
140 * <p class='bjava'>
141 *    <jc>// Array of strings with constraints</jc>
142 *    JsonSchema <jv>schema</jv> = <jk>new</jk> JsonSchema()
143 *       .setType(JsonType.<jsf>ARRAY</jsf>)
144 *       .setItems(<jk>new</jk> JsonSchema().setType(JsonType.<jsf>STRING</jsf>))
145 *       .setMinItems(1)
146 *       .setMaxItems(10)
147 *       .setUniqueItems(<jk>true</jk>);
148 * </p>
149 *
150 * <p><b>5. Conditional Schemas (Draft 07+):</b>
151 * <p class='bjava'>
152 *    <jc>// Different validation based on country</jc>
153 *    JsonSchema <jv>schema</jv> = <jk>new</jk> JsonSchema()
154 *       .setType(JsonType.<jsf>OBJECT</jsf>)
155 *       .addProperties(
156 *          <jk>new</jk> JsonSchemaProperty(<js>"country"</js>, JsonType.<jsf>STRING</jsf>),
157 *          <jk>new</jk> JsonSchemaProperty(<js>"postalCode"</js>, JsonType.<jsf>STRING</jsf>)
158 *       )
159 *       .setIf(<jk>new</jk> JsonSchema()
160 *          .addProperties(<jk>new</jk> JsonSchemaProperty(<js>"country"</js>).setConst(<js>"USA"</js>))
161 *       )
162 *       .setThen(<jk>new</jk> JsonSchema()
163 *          .addProperties(<jk>new</jk> JsonSchemaProperty(<js>"postalCode"</js>).setPattern(<js>"^[0-9]{5}$"</js>))
164 *       );
165 * </p>
166 *
167 * <p><b>6. Reusable Definitions:</b>
168 * <p class='bjava'>
169 *    <jc>// Schema with reusable components using $defs</jc>
170 *    JsonSchema <jv>schema</jv> = <jk>new</jk> JsonSchema()
171 *       .setType(JsonType.<jsf>OBJECT</jsf>)
172 *       .addDef(<js>"address"</js>, <jk>new</jk> JsonSchema()
173 *          .setType(JsonType.<jsf>OBJECT</jsf>)
174 *          .addProperties(
175 *             <jk>new</jk> JsonSchemaProperty(<js>"street"</js>, JsonType.<jsf>STRING</jsf>),
176 *             <jk>new</jk> JsonSchemaProperty(<js>"city"</js>, JsonType.<jsf>STRING</jsf>)
177 *          )
178 *       )
179 *       .addProperties(
180 *          <jk>new</jk> JsonSchemaProperty(<js>"billingAddress"</js>)
181 *             .setRef(<js>"#/$defs/address"</js>),
182 *          <jk>new</jk> JsonSchemaProperty(<js>"shippingAddress"</js>)
183 *             .setRef(<js>"#/$defs/address"</js>)
184 *       );
185 * </p>
186 *
187 * <h5 class='section'>Migration from Draft 04:</h5>
188 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
189 *    <li>Use {@link #setIdUri(Object)} instead of {@link #setId(Object)} (deprecated)
190 *    <li>Use {@link #setDefs(Map)} instead of {@link #setDefinitions(Map)} (deprecated but still works)
191 *    <li>Use {@link #setExclusiveMaximum(Number)} with a numeric value instead of a boolean flag
192 *    <li>Use {@link #setExclusiveMinimum(Number)} with a numeric value instead of a boolean flag
193 * </ul>
194 *
195 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
196 *    <li class='link'><a href="https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/json-schema-core.html">JSON Schema 2020-12 Core</a>
197 *    <li class='link'><a href="https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/json-schema-validation.html">JSON Schema 2020-12 Validation</a>
198 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauBeanJsonSchema">juneau-bean-jsonschema</a>
199 * </ul>
200 */
201@Marshalled(typeName = "schema")
202@SuppressWarnings({
203   "java:S116" // Field names follow OpenAPI/JSON Schema spec
204})
205public class JsonSchema {
206
207   /**
208    * Used during parsing to convert the <property>additionalItems</property> property to the correct class type.
209    *
210    * <ul class='spaced-list'>
211    *    <li>
212    *       If parsing a JSON-array, converts to a {@link JsonSchemaArray}.
213    *    <li>
214    *       If parsing a JSON-boolean, converts to a {@link Boolean}.
215    * </ul>
216    *
217    * <p>
218    * Serialization method is a no-op.
219    */
220   public static class BooleanOrSchemaArraySwap extends ObjectSwap<Object,Object> {
221
222      @Override /* Overridden from ObjectSwap */
223      public Object swap(MarshallingSession session, Object o) throws SerializeException {
224         return o;
225      }
226
227      @Override /* Overridden from ObjectSwap */
228      public Object unswap(MarshallingSession session, Object o, ClassMeta<?> hint) throws ParseException {
229         var cm = (o instanceof Collection ? session.getClassMeta(JsonSchemaArray.class) : session.getClassMeta(Boolean.class));
230         return session.convertToType(o, cm);
231      }
232   }
233
234   /**
235    * Used during parsing to convert the <property>additionalProperties</property> property to the correct class type.
236    *
237    * <ul class='spaced-list'>
238    *    <li>
239    *       If parsing a JSON-object, converts to a {@link JsonSchema}.
240    *    <li>
241    *       If parsing a JSON-boolean, converts to a {@link Boolean}.
242    * </ul>
243    *
244    * <p>
245    * Serialization method is a no-op.
246    */
247   public static class BooleanOrSchemaSwap extends ObjectSwap<Object,Object> {
248
249      @Override /* Overridden from ObjectSwap */
250      public Object swap(MarshallingSession session, Object o) throws SerializeException {
251         return o;
252      }
253
254      @Override /* Overridden from ObjectSwap */
255      public Object unswap(MarshallingSession session, Object o, ClassMeta<?> hint) throws ParseException {
256         var cm = (o instanceof Boolean ? session.getClassMeta(Boolean.class) : session.getClassMeta(JsonSchema.class));
257         return session.convertToType(o, cm);
258      }
259   }
260
261   /**
262    * Used during parsing to convert the <property>items</property> property to the correct class type.
263    *
264    * <ul class='spaced-list'>
265    *    <li>
266    *       If parsing a JSON-array, converts to a {@link JsonSchemaArray}.
267    *    <li>
268    *       If parsing a JSON-object, converts to a {@link JsonSchema}.
269    * </ul>
270    *
271    * <p>
272    * Serialization method is a no-op.
273    */
274   public static class JsonSchemaOrSchemaArraySwap extends ObjectSwap<Object,Object> {
275
276      @Override /* Overridden from ObjectSwap */
277      public Object swap(MarshallingSession session, Object o) throws SerializeException {
278         return o;
279      }
280
281      @Override /* Overridden from ObjectSwap */
282      public Object unswap(MarshallingSession session, Object o, ClassMeta<?> hint) throws ParseException {
283         var cm = (o instanceof Collection ? session.getClassMeta(JsonSchemaArray.class) : session.getClassMeta(JsonSchema.class));
284         return session.convertToType(o, cm);
285      }
286   }
287
288   /**
289    * Used during parsing to convert the <property>type</property> property to the correct class type.
290    *
291    * <ul class='spaced-list'>
292    *    <li>
293    *       If parsing a JSON-array, converts to a {@link JsonTypeArray}.
294    *    <li>
295    *       If parsing a JSON-object, converts to a {@link JsonType}.
296    * </ul>
297    *
298    * <p>
299    * Serialization method is a no-op.
300    */
301   public static class JsonTypeOrJsonTypeArraySwap extends ObjectSwap<Object,Object> {
302
303      @Override /* Overridden from ObjectSwap */
304      public Object swap(MarshallingSession session, Object o) throws SerializeException {
305         return o;
306      }
307
308      @Override /* Overridden from ObjectSwap */
309      public Object unswap(MarshallingSession session, Object o, ClassMeta<?> hint) throws ParseException {
310         var cm = (o instanceof Collection ? session.getClassMeta(JsonTypeArray.class) : session.getClassMeta(JsonType.class));
311         return session.convertToType(o, cm);
312      }
313   }
314
315   // @formatter:off
316   private String name;                                   // Property name.  Not serialized.
317   private URI idUri;                                     // Draft 2020-12: $id
318   private URI id;                                        // Draft 04: id (deprecated but kept for compatibility)
319   private URI schemaVersion;
320   private String title;
321   private String summary;
322   private String description;
323   private JsonType typeJsonType;                         // JsonType representation of type
324   private JsonTypeArray typeJsonTypeArray;               // JsonTypeArray representation of type
325   private Map<String,JsonSchema> definitions;            // Retained for backward compatibility
326   private Map<String,JsonSchema> defs;                   // Draft 2020-12: $defs
327   private Map<String,JsonSchema> properties;
328   private Map<String,JsonSchema> patternProperties;
329   private Map<String,JsonSchema> dependencies;           // Retained for backward compatibility
330   private Map<String,JsonSchema> dependentSchemas;       // Draft 2019-09+
331   private Map<String,List<String>> dependentRequired;    // Draft 2019-09+
332   private JsonSchema itemsSchema;                        // JsonSchema representation of items
333   private JsonSchemaArray itemsSchemaArray;              // JsonSchemaArray representation of items
334   private JsonSchemaArray prefixItems;                   // Draft 2020-12: replaces tuple validation
335   private Number multipleOf;
336   private Number maximum;
337   private Number exclusiveMaximum;                       // Draft 06+: changed from Boolean to Number
338   private Number minimum;
339   private Number exclusiveMinimum;                       // Draft 06+: changed from Boolean to Number
340   private Integer maxLength;
341   private Integer minLength;
342   private String pattern;
343   private Boolean additionalItemsBoolean;                // Boolean representation of additionalItems
344   private JsonSchemaArray additionalItemsSchemaArray;    // JsonSchemaArray representation of additionalItems
345   private JsonSchema unevaluatedItems;                   // Draft 2019-09+
346   private Integer maxItems;
347   private Integer minItems;
348   private Boolean uniqueItems;
349   private Integer maxProperties;
350   private Integer minProperties;
351   private List<String> required;
352   private Boolean additionalPropertiesBoolean;           // Boolean representation of additionalProperties
353   private JsonSchema additionalPropertiesSchema;         // JsonSchema representation of additionalProperties
354   private JsonSchema unevaluatedProperties;              // Draft 2019-09+
355   private List<Object> enum_;                            // Changed to Object to support any type
356   private Object const_;                                 // Draft 06+
357   private List<Object> examples;                         // Draft 06+
358   private List<JsonSchema> allOf;
359   private List<JsonSchema> anyOf;
360   private List<JsonSchema> oneOf;
361   private JsonSchema not;
362   private JsonSchema if_;                                // Draft 07+
363   private JsonSchema then_;                              // Draft 07+
364   private JsonSchema else_;                              // Draft 07+
365   private Boolean readOnly;                              // Draft 07+
366   private Boolean writeOnly;                             // Draft 07+
367   private String format;                                 // Annotation-level keyword
368   private String comment;                                // Draft 07+, serialized as $comment
369   private Boolean deprecated;                            // Draft 2019-09+
370   private String contentMediaType;                       // Draft 07+
371
372   private String contentEncoding;                        // Draft 07+
373
374   private URI ref;
375
376   private JsonSchemaMap schemaMap;
377
378   private JsonSchema master = this;
379   // @formatter:on
380
381   /**
382    * Default constructor.
383    */
384   public JsonSchema() { /* Empty constructor. */ }
385
386   /**
387    * Generates a {@link JsonSchema} bean from the specified type using {@link JsonSchemaBeanGenerator#DEFAULT}.
388    *
389    * @param type The type to generate a schema for.
390    * @return The generated schema bean.
391    */
392   public static JsonSchema of(Type type) {
393      return JsonSchemaBeanGenerator.DEFAULT.generate(type);
394   }
395
396   /**
397    * Generates a {@link JsonSchema} bean from the specified class using {@link JsonSchemaBeanGenerator#DEFAULT}.
398    *
399    * @param type The class to generate a schema for.
400    * @return The generated schema bean.
401    */
402   public static JsonSchema of(Class<?> type) {
403      return JsonSchemaBeanGenerator.DEFAULT.generate(type);
404   }
405
406   /**
407    * Bean property appender:  <property>additionalItems</property>.
408    *
409    * @param value
410    *    The list of items to append to the <property>additionalItems</property> property on this bean.
411    * @return This object.
412    */
413   public JsonSchema addAdditionalItems(JsonSchema...value) {
414      if (this.additionalItemsSchemaArray == null)
415         this.additionalItemsSchemaArray = new JsonSchemaArray();
416      this.additionalItemsSchemaArray.addAll(value);
417      setMasterOn(value);
418      return this;
419   }
420
421   /**
422    * Bean property appender:  <property>allOf</property>.
423    *
424    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>allOf</property> property on this bean.
425    * @return This object.
426    */
427   public JsonSchema addAllOf(JsonSchema...value) {
428      setMasterOn(value);
429      this.allOf = addAll(this.allOf, value);
430      return this;
431   }
432
433   /**
434    * Bean property appender:  <property>anyOf</property>.
435    *
436    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>anyOf</property> property on this bean.
437    * @return This object.
438    */
439   public JsonSchema addAnyOf(JsonSchema...value) {
440      if (this.anyOf == null)
441         this.anyOf = new LinkedList<>();
442      setMasterOn(value);
443      for (var s : value)
444         this.anyOf.add(s);
445      return this;
446   }
447
448   /**
449    * Bean property appender:  <property>$defs</property>.
450    *
451    * @param name The key in the defs map entry.
452    * @param value The value in the defs map entry.
453    * @return This object.
454    */
455   public JsonSchema addDef(String name, JsonSchema value) {
456      if (this.defs == null)
457         this.defs = map();
458      this.defs.put(name, value);
459      setMasterOn(value);
460      return this;
461   }
462
463   /**
464    * Bean property appender:  <property>definitions</property>.
465    *
466    * @param name The key in the definitions map entry.
467    * @param value The value in the definitions map entry.
468    * @return This object.
469    */
470   public JsonSchema addDefinition(String name, JsonSchema value) {
471      if (this.definitions == null)
472         this.definitions = map();
473      this.definitions.put(name, value);
474      setMasterOn(value);
475      return this;
476   }
477
478   /**
479    * Bean property appender:  <property>dependencies</property>.
480    *
481    * @param name The key of the entry in the dependencies map.
482    * @param value The value of the entry in the dependencies map.
483    * @return This object.
484    */
485   public JsonSchema addDependency(String name, JsonSchema value) {
486      if (this.dependencies == null)
487         this.dependencies = map();
488      this.dependencies.put(name, value);
489      setMasterOn(value);
490      return this;
491   }
492
493   /**
494    * Bean property appender:  <property>dependentRequired</property>.
495    *
496    * @param name The key of the entry in the dependentRequired map.
497    * @param value The value of the entry in the dependentRequired map.
498    * @return This object.
499    */
500   public JsonSchema addDependentRequired(String name, List<String> value) {
501      if (this.dependentRequired == null)
502         this.dependentRequired = map();
503      this.dependentRequired.put(name, value);
504      return this;
505   }
506
507   /**
508    * Bean property appender:  <property>dependentSchemas</property>.
509    *
510    * @param name The key of the entry in the dependentSchemas map.
511    * @param value The value of the entry in the dependentSchemas map.
512    * @return This object.
513    */
514   public JsonSchema addDependentSchema(String name, JsonSchema value) {
515      if (this.dependentSchemas == null)
516         this.dependentSchemas = map();
517      this.dependentSchemas.put(name, value);
518      setMasterOn(value);
519      return this;
520   }
521
522   /**
523    * Bean property appender:  <property>enum</property>.
524    *
525    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>enum</property> property on this bean.
526    * @return This object.
527    */
528   public JsonSchema addEnum(Object...value) {
529      if (this.enum_ == null)
530         this.enum_ = new LinkedList<>();
531      for (var e : value)
532         this.enum_.add(e);
533      return this;
534   }
535
536   /**
537    * Bean property appender:  <property>examples</property>.
538    *
539    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>examples</property> property on this bean.
540    * @return This object.
541    */
542   public JsonSchema addExamples(Object...value) {
543      if (this.examples == null)
544         this.examples = new LinkedList<>();
545      for (var e : value)
546         this.examples.add(e);
547      return this;
548   }
549
550   /**
551    * Bean property appender:  <property>items</property>.
552    *
553    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>items</property> property on this bean.
554    * @return This object.
555    */
556   public JsonSchema addItems(JsonSchema...value) {
557      if (this.itemsSchemaArray == null)
558         this.itemsSchemaArray = new JsonSchemaArray();
559      this.itemsSchemaArray.addAll(value);
560      setMasterOn(value);
561      return this;
562   }
563
564   /**
565    * Bean property appender:  <property>oneOf</property>.
566    *
567    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>oneOf</property> property on this bean.
568    * @return This object.
569    */
570   public JsonSchema addOneOf(JsonSchema...value) {
571      if (this.oneOf == null)
572         this.oneOf = new LinkedList<>();
573      setMasterOn(value);
574      for (var s : value)
575         this.oneOf.add(s);
576      return this;
577   }
578
579   /**
580    * Bean property appender:  <property>patternProperties</property>.
581    *
582    * <p>
583    * Properties must have their <property>name</property> property set to the pattern string when using this method.
584    *
585    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>patternProperties</property> property on this bean.
586    * @return This object.
587    * @throws BeanRuntimeException If property is found without a set <property>name</property> property.
588    */
589   public JsonSchema addPatternProperties(JsonSchemaProperty...value) {
590      if (this.patternProperties == null)
591         this.patternProperties = map();
592      for (var p : value) {
593         if (p.getName() == null)
594            throw bex(JsonSchema.class, "Invalid property passed to JsonSchema.addProperties().  Property name was null.");
595         setMasterOn(p);
596         this.patternProperties.put(p.getName(), p);
597      }
598      return this;
599   }
600
601   /**
602    * Bean property appender:  <property>prefixItems</property>.
603    *
604    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>prefixItems</property> property on this bean.
605    * @return This object.
606    */
607   public JsonSchema addPrefixItems(JsonSchema...value) {
608      if (this.prefixItems == null)
609         this.prefixItems = new JsonSchemaArray();
610      this.prefixItems.addAll(value);
611      setMasterOn(value);
612      return this;
613   }
614
615   /**
616    * Bean property appender:  <property>properties</property>.
617    *
618    * <p>
619    * Properties must have their <property>name</property> property set on them when using this method.
620    *
621    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>properties</property> property on this bean.
622    * @return This object.
623    * @throws BeanRuntimeException If property is found without a set <property>name</property> property.
624    */
625   public JsonSchema addProperties(JsonSchema...value) {
626      if (this.properties == null)
627         this.properties = map();
628      for (var p : value) {
629         if (p.getName() == null)
630            throw bex(JsonSchema.class, "Invalid property passed to JsonSchema.addProperties().  Property name was null.");
631         setMasterOn(p);
632         this.properties.put(p.getName(), p);
633      }
634      return this;
635   }
636
637   /**
638    * Bean property appender:  <property>required</property>.
639    *
640    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>required</property> property on this bean.
641    * @return This object.
642    */
643   public JsonSchema addRequired(JsonSchemaProperty...value) {
644      if (this.required == null)
645         this.required = new LinkedList<>();
646      for (var p : value)
647         this.required.add(p.getName());
648      return this;
649   }
650
651   /**
652    * Bean property appender:  <property>required</property>.
653    *
654    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>required</property> property on this bean.
655    * @return This object.
656    */
657   public JsonSchema addRequired(List<String> value) {
658      if (this.required == null)
659         this.required = new LinkedList<>();
660      value.forEach(x -> this.required.add(x));
661      return this;
662   }
663
664   /**
665    * Bean property appender:  <property>required</property>.
666    *
667    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>required</property> property on this bean.
668    * @return This object.
669    */
670   public JsonSchema addRequired(String...value) {
671      if (this.required == null)
672         this.required = new LinkedList<>();
673      for (var r : value)
674         this.required.add(r);
675      return this;
676   }
677
678   /**
679    * Bean property appender:  <property>type</property>.
680    *
681    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>type</property> property on this bean.
682    * @return This object.
683    */
684   public JsonSchema addTypes(JsonType...value) {
685      if (this.typeJsonTypeArray == null)
686         this.typeJsonTypeArray = new JsonTypeArray();
687      this.typeJsonTypeArray.addAll(value);
688      return this;
689   }

844   public Map<String,JsonSchema> getDefinitions() {

857   @BeanProp("$defs")
858   public Map<String,JsonSchema> getDefs() {

1159   /**
1160    * Returns the property with the specified name.
1161    *
1162    * <p>
1163    * This is equivalent to calling <property>getProperty(name, <jk>false</jk>)</property>.
1164    *
1165    * @param name The property name.
1166    * @return The property with the specified name, or <jk>null</jk> if no property is specified.
1167    */
1168   public JsonSchema getProperty(String name) {
1169      return getProperty(name, false);
1170   }
1171
1172   /**
1173    * Returns the property with the specified name.
1174    *
1175    * <p>
1176    * If <property>resolve</property> is <jk>true</jk>, the property object will automatically be  resolved by calling
1177    * {@link #resolve()}.
1178    * Therefore, <property>getProperty(name, <jk>true</jk>)</property> is equivalent to calling
1179    * <property>getProperty(name).resolve()</property>, except it's safe from a potential
1180    * <property>NullPointerException</property>.
1181    *
1182    * @param name The property name.
1183    * @param resolve If <jk>true</jk>, calls {@link #resolve()} on object before returning.
1184    * @return The property with the specified name, or <jk>null</jk> if no property is specified.
1185    */
1186   public JsonSchema getProperty(String name, boolean resolve) {
1187      if (properties == null)
1188         return null;
1189      var s = properties.get(name);
1190      if (s == null)
1191         return null;
1192      if (resolve)
1193         s = s.resolve();
1194      return s;
1195   }
1196

1241   /**
1242    * Bean property getter:  <property>summary</property>.
1243    *
1244    * <p>
1245    * A short, concise summary of the schema's purpose, intended for AI/LLM consumption, compact
1246    * documentation, or any context where brevity is important. Unlike {@link #getDescription()},
1247    * which can be multi-line and detailed, this value should be a single sentence or phrase.
1248    *
1249    * <p>
1250    * This is a Juneau extension. It serializes as the JSON Schema keyword <c>"summary"</c>.
1251    *
1252    * @return The value of the <property>summary</property> property, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
1253    * @since 10.0.0
1254    */
1255   public String getSummary() { return summary; }

1273      if (nn(typeJsonType))

1339   /**
1340    * Resolve schema if reference.
1341    *
1342    * <p>
1343    * If this schema is a reference to another schema (has its <property>$ref</property> property set), this
1344    * method will retrieve the referenced schema from the schema map registered with this schema.
1345    *
1346    * <p>
1347    * If this schema is not a reference, or no schema map is registered with this schema, this method is a no-op and
1348    * simply returns this object.
1349    *
1350    * @return The referenced schema, or <jk>null</jk>.
1351    */
1352   public JsonSchema resolve() {
1353      if (ref == null || master.schemaMap == null)
1354         return this;
1355      return master.schemaMap.get(ref);
1356   }
1357

1371         if (value instanceof Boolean value2)
1372            this.additionalItemsBoolean = value2;
1373         else if (value instanceof JsonSchemaArray value2) {
1374            this.additionalItemsSchemaArray = value2;
1375            setMasterOn(this.additionalItemsSchemaArray);
1376         } else {
1377            throw bex(JsonSchemaProperty.class, "Invalid attribute type ''{0}'' passed in.  Must be one of the following:  Boolean, JsonSchemaArray", cn(value));
1378         }
1379      }
1380      return this;
1381   }

1910   /**
1911    * Bean property setter:  <property>patternProperties</property>.
1912    *
1913    * @param value The new value for the <property>patternProperties</property> property on this bean.
1914    * @return This object.
1915    */
1916   public JsonSchema setPatternProperties(Map<String,JsonSchema> value) {
1917      this.patternProperties = value;
1918      if (nn(value)) {
1919         value.entrySet().forEach(x -> {
1920            var s = x.getValue();
1921            setMasterOn(s);
1922            s.setName(x.getKey());
1923         });
1924      }
1925      return this;
1926   }

1943   /**

1950      this.properties = value;
1951      if (nn(value)) {
1952         value.entrySet().forEach(x -> {
1953            var v = x.getValue();
1954            setMasterOn(v);
1955            v.setName(x.getKey());
1956         });
1957      }
1958      return this;
1959   }

2076   /**

2078    *
2079    * @param value
2080    *    The new value for the <property>type</property> property on this bean.
2081    *    This object must be of type {@link JsonType} or {@link JsonTypeArray}.
2082    * @return This object.
2083    * @throws BeanRuntimeException If invalid object type passed in.
2084    */
2085   public JsonSchema setType(Object value) {
2086      this.typeJsonType = null;
2087      this.typeJsonTypeArray = null;
2088      if (nn(value)) {
2089         if (value instanceof JsonType value2)
2090            this.typeJsonType = value2;
2091         else if (value instanceof JsonTypeArray value2)
2092            this.typeJsonTypeArray = value2;
2093         else
2094            throw bex(JsonSchemaProperty.class, "Invalid attribute type ''{0}'' passed in.  Must be one of the following:  SimpleType, SimpleTypeArray", cn(value));
2095      }
2096      return this;
2097   }

2154   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
2155   public String toString() {
2156      return JsonSerializer.DEFAULT.toString(this);
2157   }
2158
2159   private void setMasterOn(Collection<JsonSchema> ss) {
2160      if (nn(ss))
2161         ss.forEach(this::setMasterOn);
2162   }
2163
2164   private void setMasterOn(JsonSchema s) {
2165      if (nn(s))
2166         s.setMaster(this);
2167   }
2168
2169   private void setMasterOn(JsonSchema[] ss) {
2170      assertArgNotNull("ss", ss);
2171      for (var s : ss)
2172         setMasterOn(s);
2173   }
2174
2175   private void setMasterOn(JsonSchemaArray ss) {
2176      if (nn(ss))
2177         ss.forEach(this::setMasterOn);
2178   }
2179
2180   /**
2181    * Sets the master schema for this schema and all child schema objects.
2182    *
2183    * <p>
2184    * All child elements in a schema should point to a single "master" schema in order to locate registered JsonSchemaMap
2185    * objects for resolving external schemas.
2186    *
2187    * @param master The master schema to associate on this and all children.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
2188    */
2189   @SuppressWarnings({
2190      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this logic
2191   })
2192   protected void setMaster(JsonSchema master) {
2193      this.master = master;
2194      if (nn(definitions))
2195         definitions.values().forEach(x -> x.setMaster(master));
2196      if (nn(defs))
2197         defs.values().forEach(x -> x.setMaster(master));
2198      if (nn(properties))
2199         properties.values().forEach(x -> x.setMaster(master));
2200      if (nn(patternProperties))
2201         patternProperties.values().forEach(x -> x.setMaster(master));
2202      if (nn(dependencies))
2203         dependencies.values().forEach(x -> x.setMaster(master));
2204      if (nn(dependentSchemas))
2205         dependentSchemas.values().forEach(x -> x.setMaster(master));
2206      if (nn(itemsSchema))
2207         itemsSchema.setMaster(master);
2208      if (nn(itemsSchemaArray))
2209         itemsSchemaArray.forEach(x -> x.setMaster(master));
2210      if (nn(prefixItems))
2211         prefixItems.forEach(x -> x.setMaster(master));
2212      if (nn(additionalItemsSchemaArray))
2213         additionalItemsSchemaArray.forEach(x -> x.setMaster(master));
2214      if (nn(unevaluatedItems))
2215         unevaluatedItems.setMaster(master);
2216      if (nn(additionalPropertiesSchema))
2217         additionalPropertiesSchema.setMaster(master);
2218      if (nn(unevaluatedProperties))
2219         unevaluatedProperties.setMaster(master);
2220      if (nn(allOf))
2221         allOf.forEach(x -> x.setMaster(master));
2222      if (nn(anyOf))
2223         anyOf.forEach(x -> x.setMaster(master));
2224      if (nn(oneOf))
2225         oneOf.forEach(x -> x.setMaster(master));
2226      if (nn(not))
2227         not.setMaster(master);
2228      if (nn(if_))
2229         if_.setMaster(master);
2230      if (nn(then_))
2231         then_.setMaster(master);
2232      if (nn(else_))
2233         else_.setMaster(master);
2234   }
2235}
